description: GenePattern Module which implements the preprocessing and PCA steps of Conos
author: Edwin F. Juarez & Anthony Castanza;UCSD -- Mesirov Lab
plan:
## Conos.Preprocess GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Conos.Preprocess is a GenePattern module that GenePattern Module which implements the preprocessing and PCA steps of Conos

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 7 parameters:
- Required: file_list, knn, perplexity, pagoda_odgenes, projection_method, ncomps, conos_odgenes
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
Rscript /module/run_conos_preprocess.R --file_list <file_list> --k <knn> --perplexity <perplexity> --pagoda_odgenes <pagoda_odgenes> --projection_method <projection_method> --ncomps <ncomps> --conos_odgenes <conos_odgenes>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/conos\:v3

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: knn
parameters.description: Pagoda2\: default number of neighbors to use in kNN graph

parameters.name: perplexity
parameters.description: Pagoda2\: perplexity to use in generating tSNE and largeVis embeddings (default\=50)

parameters.name: pagoda_odgenes
parameters.description: Pagoda2\: number of top overdispersed genes to use (default\=3e3)

parameters.name: projection_method
parameters.description: Whether to perform PCA or CPCA

parameters.name: ncomps
parameters.description: How many PCA components to use (?) (default\=50)

parameters.name: conos_odgenes
parameters.description: Pagoda2\: number of top overdispersed genes to use (default\=1e3)
